articles.title: You and Your Research — Richard Hamming

checkpoints.description: Opening anecdotes about luck and courage
Working on important problems, open doors
Style, selling your work, final reflections

articles.notes: Day 3 of 3 (final). Carried over to Day 4 digest. Focus on style, selling your work, and Hamming's closing challenge.

articles.title: The LLM Architecture Gallery

articles.author: TechCrunch
articles.notes: Promoted from bookmarks on Day 3. LeCun's contrarian bet on JEPA and world models over LLMs.

articles.title: State of AI 2026 — Raschka's Blog Companion to Lex Fridman #490
articles.author: Sebastian Raschka
articles.notes: Bookmarked. Written companion to the Lex Fridman podcast episode.

articles.title: Dylan Patel: 3 Big Bottlenecks to Scaling AI Compute
articles.author: Dwarkesh Podcast / Dylan Patel
articles.notes: Bookmarked for commute/gym. Logic, memory, power bottlenecks in AI compute.

articles.title: AlphaProof: Olympiad-Level Formal Mathematical Reasoning with Reinforcement Learning
articles.author: Google DeepMind / Nature
articles.notes: Day 3 deep dive. RL + Lean formal proofs. Silver-medal IMO performance. Directly at the intersection of LuChin's research areas.

articles.title: Meta's Rogue AI Agent Triggers Sev-1 Security Incident
articles.author: TechCrunch
articles.notes: Day 3 quick read. Real-world case for formal agent verification.

articles.title: GPT-5.4 Is a Big Step for Codex
articles.author: Nathan Lambert / Interconnects
articles.notes: Day 3 quick read. Lambert's analysis of GPT-5.4's agent capabilities.

articles.title: Alternating Reinforcement Learning with Contextual Rubric Rewards
articles.author: arXiv
articles.notes: Day 3 quick read (abstract + intro). Structured rubric-based rewards extending RLHF/RLVR.

articles.title: Decoupling Reasoning and Confidence: Resurrecting Calibration in RLVR
articles.author: arXiv
articles.notes: Promoted from bookmarks on Day 4. Deep dive — addresses over-confidence in RLVR-trained models. Relevant to formal correctness guarantees.

articles.title: RLVR Explained: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards
articles.author: Promptfoo
articles.notes: Bookmarked. Accessible overview of the RLVR paradigm. Good primer before diving into papers.

articles.title: Karpathy: Humans Are the Bottleneck in AI Research
articles.author: WinBuzzer / Andrej Karpathy
articles.notes: Day 4 quick read. Autoresearch found 20 optimizations, 11% training speed gain. Limits: only works with computable metrics.

articles.title: Anthropic Launches Claude Code Auto Mode with Safety Gates
articles.author: TechCrunch
articles.notes: Day 4 quick read. Runtime safety classifier for agent actions — lightweight formal verification in practice.

articles.title: Robust Deep RL Using Formal Verification (TASE 2025)
articles.author: Springer LNCS
articles.notes: Day 4 quick read. Counterexample-guided RL training with formal verification. 70% reduction in training episodes.

articles.title: MCP Hits 97 Million Downloads: The Agentic Infrastructure Moment
articles.author: Digital Applied
articles.notes: Day 4 quick read. MCP from 2M to 97M downloads in 16 months. 5,800+ servers. Cross-provider adoption.

articles.title: Formal Methods for Safety-Critical ML: A Systematic Literature Review
articles.author: Frontiers in AI
articles.notes: Bookmarked. SLR covering 2020-2025. Excellent reference for literature review on formal methods + ML safety.

articles.title: 10 Tips for Research and a PhD
articles.author: Sebastian Ruder
articles.notes: Bookmarked. Practical PhD advice — read broadly, work on two things, collaborate, play the long game.

articles.title: Dario Amodei: We Are Near the End of the Exponential
articles.author: Dwarkesh Podcast / Dario Amodei
articles.notes: Bookmarked for commute/gym. AGI in 1-3 years, RL showing log-linear scaling gains, Big Blob of Compute hypothesis.
